headline: Malaysia Peacekeeping Force Maintains 850 Troops in Lebanon
context: Malaysia maintains 850 peacekeeping troops in UNIFIL Lebanon making it the 12th largest contributor to UN peacekeeping globally.

cards.big: Malaysia maintains 850 UNIFIL troops as 12th largest UN peacekeeper
cards.sub: Deployment since 2007 is Malaysia longest continuous peacekeeping mission

cards.big: Annual cost of RM280 million partially reimbursed by UN at RM180 million
cards.sub: State covers RM100 million gap from defence budget allocation

cards.big: 8 Malaysian peacekeepers wounded in 2025 during cross-border incidents
cards.sub: Escalation in regional conflict increased risk to Malaysian contingent

cards.big: Skills gained in peacekeeping transferred to domestic disaster response
cards.sub: 450 returned peacekeepers deployed during December 2025 flood operations

cards.big: Peacekeeping commitment tests whether Malaysia international obligations justify the cost and risk
850 peacekeepers in Lebanon for decades. Sustained deployment needs domestic support and clear mission renewal.
